query:
INSERT INTO pipelineDeals 
  (clientName, clientContact, clientEmail, clientPhone, dealName, serviceType, facility, company, stage, 
   estimatedMonthlyRevenue, estimatedAnnualRevenue, estimatedPallets, estimatedLoads, 
   keyServices, notes, probability, proposalDate)
VALUES 
  ('FBA Cross-Dock', NULL, NULL, NULL, 
   'Container Cross-Dock & Straight Ship', 'crossdock', 'PA-1151', 'L&M', 'proposal_sent',
   3333300, 40000000, NULL, 150,
   '150 containers/month, cross-dock operations, straight ship to Amazon FBA fulfillment centers',
   'FBA cross-dock opportunity at Bristol PA (PA-1151). 150 containers per month, straight ship model. $400K annual estimated revenue. Pitched to client.',
   55, NOW());

  (clientName, clientContact, clientEmail, clientPhone, dealName, serviceType, facility, company, stage,

VALUES
